## The gate (pinned; applied, not chosen)
- Gate = one-sided 95% **Student-t** lower bound of mean_IC. LB = **0.0156** (mean 0.0457, SD 0.2079, n 131).
- **Approved** iff LB > 0 → YES.
- Δ_net (net top-40 minus stronger baseline, fees+slip) = **5.95%**; **Deployable** iff Δ_net > 0 → YES.
- **Verdict (mechanical, §10): Approved & Deployable.**
